United States Minor Outlying Islands

declarationChecklist.description: Philippine Currency and/or any Philippine Monetary Instrument in excess of PhP 50,000.00; (i.e. Check, Bank, Draft , etc);
declarationChecklist.notes: If YES, please submit the original copy of prior authorization from the Bangko Sentral ng Pilipinas at the Bureau of Customs Arrival Area.

declarationChecklist.description: Foreign Currency and/or Foreign Monetary Instrument in excess of USD 10,000.00 or its equivalent;
declarationChecklist.notes: If YES, please fill-out the Foreign Currency and Other Foreign Exchange-Denominated Bearer Monetary Instruments Declaration Form at the Bureau of Customs Arrival Area.
If YES, please submit prior import permit/clearance from the Philippine Amusement and Gaming Corporation.

declarationChecklist.description: Cosmetics, skin care products, food supplements and medicines in excess of quantities for personal use;
declarationChecklist.notes: If YES, please submit prior important permit/clearance from the Food and Drug Administration.

declarationChecklist.description: Dangerous drugs such as morphine, marijuana, opium, poppies or synthetic drugs;
declarationChecklist.notes: If YES, please submit import permit/clearance from the Philippine Drug Enforcement Agency.
If YES, please submit the import permit/clearance from Firearms and Explosives Office, Philippine National Police.

declarationChecklist.description: Alcohol and/or tobacco products in commercial quantities;
Foodstuff(s), fruit(s), vegetable(s), live animal(s) (i.e. meat,eggs etc.), marine and aquatic products(s), plant(s) and/or the product(s) and their by-product(s);
declarationChecklist.notes: If YES, please submit the import permit/clearance from the National Plant Quarantine Services/National Veterinary Quarantine Services.

declarationChecklist.description: Mobile phones, hand-held radios and similar gadgets in excess of quantities for personal use, and radio commumication equipments;
Cremains (human ashes), human organs or tissues;
declarationChecklist.notes: If YES, please secure clearance from the Bureau of Quarantine.

declarationChecklist.description: Jewelry, gold, precious metals or gems
